projectDescription: A Discord bot that retrieves CNAM class schedules from Google Sheets and displays them as formatted images in Discord.
keyFeatures: Discord slash command integration for schedule retrieval
Google Sheets CSV data source with automatic parsing
Visual schedule generation with color-coded course blocks
Week-based schedule display with specific date queries
Automated color generation for course subjects
publicApiSurface: /planning date:DD-MM-YYYY - Display schedule for specific date
get_week_image_for_date(ref_date) - Generate schedule image for date
get_current_week_image() - Generate current week schedule image
extract_month_df(df_raw, year, month) - Extract month data from CSV
remplacer_code_matiere(code) - Map course codes to full names
couleur_matiere(code) - Get color for course code
